perturbation.original_text: "Business" means an online real estate media platform in the PRC that (i) provides information and updates related to real estate, home furnishing and construction in the PRC and provides real estate, home furnishing and construction advertising services, and (ii) operates a business-to- business and business-to-consumer Internet platform targeting participants in the PRC real estate industry, in each case, as currently conducted or contemplated to be conducted on the websites owned or operated by Licensee or any of Licensee's Affiliates in the PRC.
perturbation.changed_text: "Business" means an online real estate media platform in the PRC that (i) provides information and updates related to real estate ONLY, and (ii) operates a business-to- business and business-to-consumer Internet platform targeting participants in the PRC real estate industry, in each case, as currently conducted or contemplated to be conducted on the websites owned or operated by Licensee or any of Licensee's Affiliates in the PRC.
perturbation.explanation: By changing the definition of 'Business' to include only real estate, and removing home furnishing and construction, it creates a contradiction. Licensee is granted the right to use Licensed Domain Names in connection with the Business, and the term previously was defined as real estate, home furnishing and construction. Now, the licensee is only allowed to create content in the real estate category. This creates a contradiction if Licensee creates content that is non-real estate.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2.1. Grant of Licenses. (a) Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, Licensor hereby grants to Licensee, and Licensee hereby accepts from Licensor, an exclusive, non-transferable (except as set forth in Section 10.7) and non-sublicensable (except as provided in Section 2.1(c)) license to use the Licensed Domain Names in connection with the Business during the Term. Except as provided in Section 2.3, Licensee's use of the Licensed Domain Names under the terms of this Agreement shall be free of any fees.
perturbation.justification: The changed text narrows the definition of 'Business' to include only real estate, removing 'home furnishing and construction'. This contradicts section 2.1(a), which grants the licensee the right to use the Licensed Domain Names in connection with the Business. The original definition allowed for content creation related to real estate, home furnishing, and construction. The new definition restricts the licensee to only real estate content, creating a contradiction if they create content related to home furnishing or construction as the grant in 2.1(a) would imply they are allowed to. This creates an ambiguity and potential unenforceability as to the scope of the license grant.
